founder_letter:
To the man reading this,

I built this because I needed it and it didn't exist.

I've been broken by love. Wrecked by family. Stabbed by people I called friends. I know what it feels like to have something eating you from the inside and nowhere to put it.

So I bottled it. Like you probably have.

This is that bottle.

Write what you can't say out loud. Throw it into the void. Someone out there — another man carrying his own weight — might catch it. Not to judge it. Not to fix it. Just to hold it for a moment and say: I see you.

You don't need to be okay here. You just need to be honest.

That's enough. You're enough.

— Rajat
setup_title: No name. No photo. No history.
setup_subtitle: Just you and what you're carrying.
setup_name_placeholder: A name only you will see
setup_email_hint: Only used if you lose your streak. Nothing else.
rule_body: No judgment. Not of yourself. Not of others.
theme_self: A version of myself I mourn
write_placeholder: Start anywhere. There's no wrong way to begin.
reflection_header: Before you seal this — let us read it back to you.
reflection_error: We couldn't reach the reflection service. You can still seal your letter.
seal_question: What do you want to do with it?
throw_sub: Someone will find it. Or the sea will keep it. Either way — you let it go.
crisis_title: Before this goes anywhere — are you okay right now?
crisis_sub: You don't have to answer. But these people are listening:
crisis_letter_note: Your letter is saved privately. It's not lost.
sea_empty: The sea is quiet right now. Check back soon.
sea_keep_sub: If you keep it, you two can talk. Anonymously. For 7 days.
chat_rules_body: No names. No photos. No judgment. When it ends, it's gone. Both of you move on.
chat_expired_body: Whatever was said here — it mattered. Now it's gone. The way it should be.
checkin_saved: Saved. No one else will read this.
settings_delete_confirm: This deletes everything. Letters, check-ins, chat history. It cannot be undone.
settings_privacy: We store nothing that can identify you. Your letters are yours. Your chats disappear.
version_force_body: This version of Khaali is no longer supported. Please update to continue.
version_soft_body: A newer version of Khaali is available.
